name: ensembl
description: Ensembl REST — gene/transcript/protein ID resolution, cross-references, sequence retrieval, gene structure, and Variant Effect Predictor (VEP). The primary ID translator in genomics. Backed by the public Ensembl REST API (https://rest.ensembl.org/) — no auth. Vendored from the google-deepmind/science-skills bundle.
author: zorai

resolve-gene.description: Resolve a gene symbol / alias / RefSeq ID to one or more Ensembl gene IDs (ENSG).

map-id.description: Cross-reference an Ensembl gene/transcript/protein ID to external databases (RefSeq, UniProt, HGNC, etc.).

get-sequence.description: Fetch raw genomic DNA sequence for a coordinate window (region).

gene-summary.description: Get high-level metadata for a gene: symbol, biotype, location, description.

python.command: uv run scripts/ensembl_api.py gene-summary "${ENS_ENSG_ID:?set ENS_ENSG_ID (e.g. ENSG00000141510)}" ${ENS_OUTPUT:+--output $ENS_OUTPUT} ${ENS_ASSEMBLY:+--assembly $ENS_ASSEMBLY}

transcripts.description: List transcripts for a gene, with optional MANE/canonical filter.

canonical-tss.description: Get transcription start site (TSS) coordinate for the canonical transcript of a gene.

python.command: uv run scripts/ensembl_api.py canonical-tss "${ENS_GENE:?set ENS_GENE (symbol or ENSG ID)}" ${ENS_OUTPUT:+--output $ENS_OUTPUT} ${ENS_ASSEMBLY:+--assembly $ENS_ASSEMBLY}

transcript-structure.description: Get exon, CDS, and UTR layout for a transcript (ENST ID).

python.command: uv run scripts/ensembl_api.py transcript-structure "${ENS_ENST_ID:?set ENS_ENST_ID (transcript ID, e.g. ENST00000269305)}" ${ENS_OUTPUT:+--output $ENS_OUTPUT} ${ENS_ASSEMBLY:+--assembly $ENS_ASSEMBLY}

protein-info.description: Get ENSP ID and sequence length for a transcript (ENST).

protein-sequence.description: Fetch the amino acid sequence (FASTA) for a transcript (ENST) or protein (ENSP) ID.

python.command: uv run scripts/ensembl_api.py protein-sequence "${ENS_ID:?set ENS_ID (transcript or protein ID)}" ${ENS_OUTPUT:+--output $ENS_OUTPUT} ${ENS_ASSEMBLY:+--assembly $ENS_ASSEMBLY}

vep.description: Variant Effect Predictor — annotate a single variant with its functional consequences on overlapping transcripts, regulatory features, and known variants. Required: --variant (e.g. 'chr1 230710048 A G' or HGVS notation).
